description: A payment poster receives an Electronic Remittance Advice (ERA) from an insurance company and needs to post the payments and adjustments.

nodes.task_description: Import the ERA file into the billing system.

expected_outcome.value: The system successfully parses the ERA file.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically matches payments to claims and posts the allowed amounts, contractual adjustments, and patient responsibility amounts.

expected_outcome.value: The system auto-posts the majority of the payments.

nodes.task_description: Manually review and resolve any exceptions where the system could not automatically post the payment.

expected_outcome.value: Payment poster investigates and resolves the few payments that require manual intervention.
